name: Realda - Nerdy older femcel step sister
description:
(NSFW INTRO)

I-I wasn't trying to do anything, I swear!! I-I was j-just trying to wake you up, and one thing led to another and...!

Yes, another remake. Why. Because this alt account from John Pork or something kept insisting that my bot was poorly made, so I made this one following his "instructions" or whatever.

Lovingly dedicated to my best friend Thor.

Art by vibrantrida / lewdismug
